name: Foundant Grant Management API
what_it_does: Foundant grant management REST API for community foundations, family foundations, and scholarship programs to manage grant applications, awards, and reporting with an emphasis on ease-of-use for smaller foundations. Enables AI agents to manage grant application intake and form configuration for community foundation automation, handle applicant evaluation and scoring for scholarship selection automation, access grant award and payment tracking for foundation disbursement automation, retrieve grantee reporting and outcome collection for community foundation impact automation, manage reviewer assignment and evaluation committee coordination for grant review automation, handle letter of inquiry and grant cycle management for foundation program automation, access fund management and donor advised fund integration for community foundation grant automation, retrieve scholarship award and academic progress tracking for scholarship program automation, manage calendar and deadline tracking for grant program schedule automation, and integrate Foundant with community foundation accounting systems and donor portals for end-to-end community foundation management.
use_cases: Managing community foundation grant cycles from automation agents
Processing scholarship applications from educational fund agents
Tracking grantee outcomes from foundation impact agents
Coordinating grant review from foundation committee agents
not_for: Large private foundation complex grantmaking (use Fluxx)
Corporate employee giving programs (use Benevity or CyberGrants)
Government grant programs with regulatory complexity
best_when: A community foundation, family foundation, scholarship fund, or small private foundation wanting AI agents to automate grant cycle management, scholarship selection, grantee reporting, and fund management within Foundant's user-friendly grant management platform.
avoid_when: SCHOLARSHIP PROGRAM TITLE VI/IX COMPLIANCE: Automated scholarship application scoring via Foundant using algorithmic criteria must comply with Title VI and Title IX nondiscrimination requirements; automated scoring that disparately impacts protected class applicants creates scholarship program civil rights compliance exposure. DONOR ADVISED FUND GRANT RECOMMENDATION COMPLIANCE: Automated DAF grant recommendations processed via Foundant must comply with IRS donor advised fund rules; automated grant recommendations by donors to organizations in which they have personal financial interest creates IRS self-dealing violation for community foundation. COMMUNITY FOUNDATION CHARITABLE SOLICITATION REGISTRATION: Automated donation processing for community foundation programs via Foundant requires charitable solicitation registration in donor states; automated giving without multi-state charitable solicitation compliance creates state consumer protection violation.

auth.notes: Foundant uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Bozeman, Montana HQ. Founded 2007 by Amber Boaz and Matt Chandler. Acquired by Bonterra in 2022. Part of Bonterra's social impact technology portfolio alongside CyberGrants and EveryAction. Community foundation, scholarship, and grantmaking focus. GLM (Grant Lifecycle Manager) and SLM (Scholarship Lifecycle Manager) products. SOC2. Competes with Fluxx, Blackbaud Grantseeker, and Submittable for foundation grant management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual subscription for foundations
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription based on grant volume and foundation size; GLM and SLM module pricing; API access included in subscription
pricing.notes: Bozeman MT. Bonterra subsidiary since 2022. Annual subscription. Foundation-size-based pricing. GLM and SLM modules. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; grant and application queries throttled; no webhooks — polling required

known_agent_gotchas: NO WEBHOOKS — ALL EVENTS REQUIRE POLLING: Foundant does not support webhooks; automated triggers for application submission, review completion, award decision, and grantee report submission require scheduled polling; implement polling frequency aligned with grant cycle cadence (hourly during active review periods, daily during reporting periods)

BONTERRA ACQUISITION PLATFORM ROADMAP UNCERTAINTY: Foundant was acquired by Bonterra in 2022 alongside CyberGrants; Bonterra platform consolidation may affect Foundant product roadmap and API development investment; evaluate Foundant API stability and migration timeline before building complex automated workflows dependent on specific Foundant API behavior

API KEY FULL ACCOUNT ACCESS: Foundant API key provides access to all foundation grants and applicant data without scope controls; automated agents with API key can access all program applicant PII and grant data; implement application-level access control for multi-program automated workflows

DAF GRANT RECOMMENDATION SELF-DEALING CHECK: Automated donor advised fund grant recommendation processing via Foundant must verify that donor does not have disqualified relationship with recipient organization; IRS DAF self-dealing rules prohibit grants where donor receives private benefit; implement disqualified person check before automated DAF grant processing

SCHOLARSHIP ACADEMIC PROGRESS VERIFICATION: Automated scholarship renewal processing via Foundant SLM must verify awardee academic progress (GPA, credit hours) before automated renewal disbursement; automated renewal without academic progress verification creates disbursement to academically ineligible scholars

GRANT CYCLE OPEN vs CLOSED STATUS FOR INTAKE: Automated application intake via Foundant must check grant cycle open status before accepting submissions; automated submission intake for closed grant cycle creates applicant data ingestion without review pathway; implement grant cycle status check in automated intake workflow to correctly redirect out-of-cycle applicants
agent_readiness.security_notes: Grant management. SOC2. API key. US. Applicant PII, foundation grant data, and scholarship records.

security_score_components.security_notes: Foundation grant management. SOC2. API key. US. Applicant PII, grant, and scholarship data.
